description_long: This object is an open book with a dark green cover and blank, white pages. The book is laid flat, with both covers and the spine visible, and the pages are slightly curved, suggesting a realistic paper texture. The edges of the cover are clean and straight, and the spine is subtly rounded at the center. There are no visible markings, illustrations, or text on the pages or cover. The book appears to be of average thickness, suitable for a notebook or a standard hardcover. The overall appearance is simple and utilitarian, with no decorative elements.
description: An open book with a dark green cover and blank, white pages, laid flat with a subtle spine and no visible markings or illustrations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open book with both covers and the spine visible, highlighting the blank white pages and dark green border.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the thinness of the book and the slight curvature of the pages, with the green cover edge visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the open book with blank pages and the green border, but from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the book's thin profile and the gentle curve of the pages.
